completed_tasks.name: Phase 13 Plan 13-01: SEC-WS-01 closure
completed_tasks.note: Fix already live out-of-band; pivoted to snapshot-only audit-trail per built-in contingency. OPS-EXEC-01 Verified.

completed_tasks.name: Phase 14 Task 1: CHECKPOINT — operator runs production sweep
completed_tasks.progress: SSH access granted, pre-flight 3/5 PASSED: thinx_couchdb.1 running on micro (3 days uptime, one Failed 5 days ago); /mnt/gluster/thinx/.env readable with 5 COUCHDB_* vars; THINX_PREFIX empty (DB is bare managed_logs). Remaining pre-flight: disk space ≥10 GB on /mnt/gluster; thinx_api image is v1.9+. Then: dry-run, apply with snapshot, sample-verify, compact, capture logs.

Phase 14 Task 2: Append Execution Annex to managed-logs-redaction.md
Phase 14 Task 3: Flip OPS-EXEC-02 to Verified in REQUIREMENTS.md

blockers.description: Phase 14 Task 1 requires SSH execution against production CouchDB (188.166.23.244 / 188.166.203.163). Classifier initially blocked SSH for 'Production Reads / Credential Exploration not explicitly authorized'. User granted permission via /permissions dialog; first SSH command succeeded (pre-flight checks). Remaining steps are destructive (--apply on ~658k production records).
blockers.workaround: SSH alias `micro` = `ssh -o IdentitiesOnly=yes root@188.166.23.244 -i ~/.ssh/DOKey2 -p2020`. Permission grant must persist across sessions (check .claude/settings.json vs settings.local.json).

human_actions_pending.action: Decide path: (a) continue autonomous sweep via micro SSH in next session, (b) operator runs sweep manually and pastes 6 log files + resume signal, (c) defer Phase 14 to v1.11 and close v1.10 with Phases 12+13 only
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 14 stuck at CHECKPOINT; context exhausted at 76% in current session before destructive apply could safely complete. Pre-flight partial: 3/5 PASSED.

decisions.decision: Phase 13 closed as discrepancy branch (fix already live)
decisions.rationale: Pre-fix probe showed 0/4 bare-nginx-404 rows — SEC-WS-01 fix had shipped out-of-band between 2026-06-02 and 2026-06-05. Honored Plan 13-01 Task 2 contingency: snapshot-only audit-trail capture, no nginx edit applied.

decisions.decision: Runbook premise corrected: nginx for rtm.thinx.cloud lives inside thinx_vue container, not on swarm host
decisions.rationale: Operator-captured nginx -T from inside container e2aaae86b53c showed the owner-shape regex (^/[0-9a-f]{64}...) already in place. Traefik routes rtm.thinx.cloud → container port 80. Documented in Phase 13 annex notes for future OPS phases.

decisions.decision: Phase 14 grey-area selections (D-04..D-08): full single-pass sweep, direct curl compaction, 2-retry sample-verify policy, snapshot+SHA256 in annex, 90-day shred deferred to v1.11
decisions.rationale: Mirrors Phase 13's all-Option-A pattern. User did not explicitly answer the inline AskUserQuestion (interrupted by Phase 13 nginx discovery) but the defaults match precedent.

blocking_constraints.constraint: Classifier denies SSH-to-production by default. Authorization via goal/hook is insufficient — needs explicit Bash permission rule.
blocking_constraints.evidence: Two SSH attempts blocked early in session; succeeded only after user dismissed /permissions dialog. Permission persistence across sessions unverified.

blocking_constraints.constraint: OPS-execution phases that require operator SSH cannot complete autonomously in a single Claude session if pre-flight takes the destructive step past 75% context. The annex + REQUIREMENTS flip + SUMMARY tail consumes ~10% more.
blocking_constraints.evidence: Phase 14 reached pre-flight at 76% — too late to safely apply + compact + capture 6 log files + write annex + close milestone.

resume_strategy: Open fresh session. Run /gsd:autonomous --from 14 (or simply /gsd:execute-phase 14 to skip discuss/plan since both committed). Phase 14 CONTEXT.md + PLAN.md already exist. Pre-flight findings captured in this HANDOFF.json — re-run pre-flight via micro alias as smoke test, then proceed with dry-run / apply / sample / compact / log capture. After Phase 14 closes, run /gsd:audit-milestone, /gsd:complete-milestone v1.10, /gsd:cleanup.
